name: rad-seo-optimizer
description: RAD SEO Optimizer — honest, codebase-scoped SEO tooling for Claude Code. Covers codebase SEO linting, JSON-LD schema generation, AI-extractability content optimization, broken-link auditing, on-page optimization, keyword ideation + intent classification, content strategy, and observable competitive research. Does NOT pretend to measure numerical Core Web Vitals, keyword volumes, backlink profiles, or actual AI citation rates — those require Path B MCP integrations documented in references/CAPABILITIES.md.
